g.aria-label: Symbol legend titled 'Signal class' for fill color with 3 values: Positive, Neutral, Purifying

Subtitle text 'Point size and color emphasize site-level behavior across partitions. Filled points pass FDR <= 0.10; dN/dS > 1.05 is shown as positive, dN/dS < 0.95 as purifying, and intermediate values as neutral.'

text.tspan: Point size and color emphasize site-level behavior across partitions.
Filled points pass FDR <= 0.10; dN/dS > 1.05 is shown as positive, dN/dS < 0.95 as purifying, and intermediate values as neutral.
